name: Flutter + Riverpod
systemContext: Flutter project using Riverpod for state management and go_router for navigation. Dart 3+ with null safety. Feature-first folder structure.

rules: Never put business logic in Widget build() methods
Use Riverpod with code generation (@riverpod annotation)
Providers go in the application/ layer of each feature
Use AsyncNotifier for async state, Notifier for sync state
Never use setState() for business logic — only for local UI state
Prefer ConsumerWidget over StatefulWidget when using providers
Extract widgets into separate files when they exceed 50 lines
Always specify const constructors where possible
Null safety is required everywhere — no late without initialization
Use freezed for data classes and union types
Error handling with Either<Failure, Success> from fpdart
No print() in production code — use a logger package

hooks.command: cd {projectDir} && dart format {filePath} && flutter analyze {filePath} 2>&1 | tail -20

forbiddenZones.reason: Native Android config requires platform review
Native iOS config requires platform review
